mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-b2blabel-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceB2blabelReceive - b2b 출고 수신 인터페이스 조회 */ SELECT DLV_BOX_NO , DLV_BOX_BCD , WRK_DATE , GI_DATE , BATCH_NO , SHOP_CD , REC_WHS_COD , WHS_COD , EQMT_TYP_CD , GI_ORD_NO , ITM_CD , LOAD_QTY , ITM_PKG_UNIT_CD , FLR_TBL_NO , LOT_NO , DLV_BOX_CTNR_NO , DLV_PLT_CTNR_NO , LCS_RT_FUL_RT_NO , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_B2B_OB_LABEL WHERE DLV_BOX_NO = #{dlvBoxNo} AND DLV_BOX_BCD = #{dlvBoxBcd} AND ITM_CD = #{itmCd}

/* wms-inbound-b2blabel-receive-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceB2blabelList - b2b 출고 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT OL.OBLABELSEQNO , OL.DLV_BOX_NO , OL.DLV_BOX_BCD AS BOXLABELNO , OL.WRK_DATE , OL.GI_DATE AS DLVYDAY , OL.BATCH_NO , OL.SHOP_CD , OL.REC_WHS_COD AS CTKEY , OL.WHS_COD , OL.EQMT_TYP_CD , OL.GI_ORD_NO AS EXTORDERKEY , OL.ITM_CD AS ICKEY , OL.LOAD_QTY AS QTY , OL.ITM_PKG_UNIT_CD AS UOM , OL.FLR_TBL_NO , CASE WHEN IC.EXPCKYN = 'Y' AND IC.EXPCKTYPECD = 'E' THEN CASE SUBSTR(OL.LOT_NO, 1, 8) WHEN '99991231' THEN NULL ELSE SUBSTR(OL.LOT_NO, 1, 8) END ELSE NULL END AS EXPDATE , OL.DLV_BOX_CTNR_NO , OL.DLV_PLT_CTNR_NO , OL.LCS_RT_FUL_RT_NO AS CNTRLABELNO , OL.INSERTDATE , OL.INSERTURKEY , OL.UPDATEDATE , OL.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_B2B_OB_LABEL OL INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OL.REC_WHS_COD = IC.CTKEY AND OL.ITM_CD = IC.ICKEY WHERE OL.PRCSYN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(OL.RCVDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
